message.content:
Create layout components for a Stan Store clone at C:\Users\User\stan-io. This uses the same design system as citedby.io: sidebar left, header top, main content area. Use CSS variables for theming. Use lucide-react icons. Write each file with the Write tool.

### File 1: `C:\Users\User\stan-io\components\layout\Header.tsx`
Minimal 48px header:
- Left: Logo "Stan.io" (Stan bold, .io in accent color)
- Center: nothing (keep it minimal)  
- Right: Credits/revenue indicator, ThemeToggle, user avatar with dropdown

Props: user (with name, avatar), onLogoClick, onNavigate

### File 2: `C:\Users\User\stan-io\components\layout\Sidebar.tsx`
Sidebar (w-56) with collapsible navigation groups. Include a mobile hamburger overlay version.

Navigation structure:
```
HOME
  Dashboard
  My Store (link to public store preview)

PRODUCTS
  All Products
  Digital Products
  Courses
  Bookings
  Memberships

CUSTOMERS
  Orders
  Subscribers
  Affiliates

MARKETING
  Email Flows
  Broadcasts
  Discount Codes

ANALYTICS
  Overview
  Traffic Sources

SETTINGS
  Store Settings
  Integrations
  Payment Setup
  Account
```

Props: activePage, onPageChange, user (for avatar in footer), plan. 
Include active item highlighting with accent left bar. Include plan badge in footer.

### File 3: `C:\Users\User\stan-io\components\layout\AppShell.tsx`
Layout wrapper combining Header + Sidebar + main content area.
Props: activePage, onPageChange, user, onNavigate, children.

The layout should be:
```
┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Header (h-12)                       │
├────────┬─────────────────────────────┤
│Sidebar │  Main content (scrollable)  │
│ (w-56) │  max-w-6xl mx-auto p-6      │
│        │                             │
└────────┴─────────────────────────────┘
```

Create all 3 files. Each should import from the appropriate relative paths.

content.text: All files are in place. Let me do a quick verification by reading back each of the three main files to confirm the content.

All three layout components are created and verified. Here is a summary of what was built:

---

## Files Created

### File 1: `C:\Users\User\stan-io\components\layout\Header.tsx` (136 lines)

Minimal 48px header with:
- **Left**: "Stan" in bold primary text + ".io" in accent color, clickable via `onLogoClick`
- **Center**: Empty spacer (minimal design)
- **Right**: Revenue indicator (DollarSign icon in success green), ThemeToggle button, and a user avatar with a dropdown menu
- **Avatar dropdown** includes: user name display, "My Account" link, "Settings" link, and a red "Log Out" button
- Dropdown closes on outside click via `useRef` + `useEffect` listener
- Props: `user` (name, avatar), `onLogoClick`, `onNavigate`

### File 2: `C:\Users\User\stan-io\components\layout\Sidebar.tsx` (267 lines)

Fixed-width sidebar (`w-56`) with collapsible navigation groups matching the full navigation structure:
- **HOME**: Dashboard, My Store
- **PRODUCTS**: All Products, Digital Products, Courses, Bookings, Memberships
- **CUSTOMERS**: Orders, Subscribers, Affiliates
- **MARKETING**: Email Flows, Broadcasts, Discount Codes
- **ANALYTICS**: Overview, Traffic Sources
- **SETTINGS**: Store Settings, Integrations, Payment Setup, Account

Features:
- Active item highlighting with a 3px purple accent bar on the left (`bg-[var(--accent)]`) and subtle accent background
- Each group uses the `CollapsibleSection` component (chevron toggle, all open by default)
- **Mobile**: hamburger button (fixed, top-left, z-60) toggles a full-height overlay drawer (w-72) with a backdrop blur overlay
- **Footer**: plan badge ("Creator" / "Creator Pro" with accent styling for Pro), and user avatar + name
- Exported helpers: `NAV_GROUPS`, `PAGE_ALIASES`, `getSectionFromPage()` for use by other components
- Props: `activePage`, `onPageChange`, `user`, `plan`
- All icons from `lucide-react`: LayoutDashboard, Store, Package, FileDown, GraduationCap, CalendarClock, Crown, ShoppingCart, Users, UserPlus, Mail, Send, Ticket, BarChart3, Globe, Settings, Link2, CreditCard, UserCog, Menu, X

### File 3: `C:\Users\User\stan-io\components\layout\AppShell.tsx` (67 lines)

Layout wrapper combining Header + Sidebar + main content area:
```
+--------------------------------------+
|  Header (h-12)                       |
+--------+-----------------------------+
|Sidebar |  Main content (scrollable)  |
| (w-56) |  max-w-6xl mx-auto p-6      |
|        |                             |
+--------+-----------------------------+
```

- Full viewport height (`h-screen flex flex-col`)
- Header sits on top across full width
- Body is `flex flex-1 min-h-0` with sidebar and main side by side
- Main content area is independently scrollable (`overflow-y-auto`) with `max-w-6xl mx-auto p-6 md:p-8`
- Logo click navigates to `'dashboard'`
- `onNavigate` prop allows custom navigation handling (falls back to `onPageChange`)
- Props: `activePage`, `onPageChange`, `user`, `plan`, `onNavigate`, `children`

### Supporting Files Also Created

- **`C:\Users\User\stan-io\lib\theme-context.tsx`** -- ThemeProvider + useTheme hook (persists to localStorage, respects `prefers-color-scheme`, toggles `.dark` class on `<html>`)
- **`C:\Users\User\stan-io\components\ui\ThemeToggle.tsx`** -- Sun/Moon toggle button consuming the theme context
- **`C:\Users\User\stan-io\components\ui\CollapsibleSection.tsx`** -- Reusable collapsible group header with chevron animation

All components use CSS custom variables from `globals.css` (`--bg-surface`, `--bg-sidebar`, `--accent`, `--text-primary`, `--border-default`, `--glass-active`, etc.) for full light/dark theme support, matching the citedby-io design system.
